parameters.query:
INSERT INTO n8n_execution_summary (
  ref_date,
  workflowId,
  workflowName,
  status,
  mode,
  total_execucoes,
  total_finalizadas,
  total_com_retry
)
SELECT
  DATE(e.createdAt) AS ref_date,
  e.workflowId,
  COALESCE(w.name, e.workflowName) AS workflowName,
  e.status,
  e.mode,
  COUNT(*) AS total_execucoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.finished = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_finalizadas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.retryOf IS NOT NULL OR e.retrySuccessId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_com_retry
FROM n8n_executions e
LEFT JOIN n8n_workflows w
  ON w.id = e.workflowId
GROUP BY
  DATE(e.createdAt),
  e.workflowId,
  COALESCE(w.name, e.workflowName),
  e.status,
  e.mode
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  workflowName = VALUES(workflowName),
  total_execucoes = VALUES(total_execucoes),
  total_finalizadas = VALUES(total_finalizadas),
  total_com_retry = VALUES(total_com_retry);

INSERT INTO n8n_execution_summary (
  ref_date,
  workflowId,
  workflowName,
  status,
  mode,
  total_execucoes,
  total_finalizadas,
  total_com_retry
)
SELECT
  DATE(e.createdAt) AS ref_date,
  e.workflowId,
  COALESCE(w.name, e.workflowName) AS workflowName,
  e.status,
  e.mode,
  COUNT(*) AS total_execucoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.finished = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_finalizadas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.retryOf IS NOT NULL OR e.retrySuccessId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_com_retry
FROM n8n_executions e
LEFT JOIN n8n_workflows w
  ON w.id = e.workflowId
GROUP BY
  DATE(e.createdAt),
  e.workflowId,
  COALESCE(w.name, e.workflowName),
  e.status,
  e.mode
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  workflowName = VALUES(workflowName),
  total_execucoes = VALUES(total_execucoes),
  total_finalizadas = VALUES(total_finalizadas),
  total_com_retry = VALUES(total_com_retry);
